channel.title: Homes on Jeremias Knoblauch
channel.description: Recent content in Homes on Jeremias Knoblauch

item.description: News Find slides of my Generalized Variational Inference (GVI) talk here and the GVI workshop slides for part 1, part 2 and part 3 Check out Christian Robert’s blog entry on Generalized Variational Inference! I had a fantastic time collaborating with David Dunson at Duke University from 14/03/19-26/06/19 I am thrilled to be the first UK-based doctoral researcher to have been selected into the Facebook Fellowship programme, see here for a press release by the Alan Turing Institute.
